title: Sweet Chewy Polish Noodles Bowl
description: A creamy, sweet and chewy noodle bowl that marries Polish comfort food with a tangy Chinese sesame glaze, perfect for a lowfat crowdpleaser.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a rolling boil (100 °C).
Add buckwheat noodles and cook for 8–10 min until al dente, then drain and rinse under cold water.
While noodles cook, whisk together almond milk, Greek yogurt, honey, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, minced garlic, and grated ginger in a bowl until smooth.
In a small saucepan, heat the sesame seeds over medium heat for 1 min until fragrant, then remove.
Toss the drained noodles with the whisked sauce until evenly coated.
Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds and sliced green onions over the noodles.
Serve immediately, or chill in the fridge for a cold version (no longer than 2 h).
Optional: Drizzle a little extra sesame oil for extra shine before serving.
